prompt.content:
You are a spatial reasoning assistant analyzing a 3D scene image.
You will receive a list of objects visible in the image and a set of distance comparison questions.

For each question, compare 3D distances — either between two pairs of objects,
or from a common anchor object to two candidate objects.
Answer with exactly one of: "<" (first pair/candidate closer), "~=" (approximately equal), ">" (first pair/candidate farther).

Respond ONLY with a JSON array. Each element must have "qid" and "answer" (a string: "<", "~=", or ">").

Example:
[{"qid": "qrr_0001", "answer": "<"}, {"qid": "qrr_0002", "answer": "~="}]

content.text:
Objects in the image:
  - obj_0: large blue metal cylinder
  - obj_1: small blue rubber cube
  - obj_2: small blue metal sphere
  - obj_3: small green rubber sphere
  - obj_4: small yellow metal cube
  - obj_5: small purple rubber sphere
  - obj_6: large yellow rubber sphere
  - obj_7: small green rubber cylinder
  - obj_8: large green metal cylinder
  - obj_9: small green rubber sphere

Questions:
[qrr_0101] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0102] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_7 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0103] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_7 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0104] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_8 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0105] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_2. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0106] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_3. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0107] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >

[qrr_0109] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0110] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0111] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_3. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0112] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0113] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0114] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0115] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0116] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0117] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0118] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0119] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >

raw_response:
I need to analyze the 3D scene and compare distances between pairs of objects. Let me identify the positions of each object based on the image.

From the image, I can estimate the approximate positions:
- obj_0 (large blue metal cylinder): back-left area
- obj_1 (small blue rubber cube): front-right area
- obj_2 (small blue metal sphere): middle area
- obj_3 (small green rubber sphere): left area (top-left)
- obj_4 (small yellow metal cube): middle area
- obj_5 (small purple rubber sphere): right area
- obj_6 (large yellow rubber sphere): right-center area
- obj_7 (small green rubber cylinder): left-center area
- obj_8 (large green metal cylinder): back-right area
- obj_9 (small green rubber sphere): front-center area

Now let me compare distances for each question:

[qrr_0101] obj_0 to obj_4 vs obj_6 to obj_9: obj_0 is far back-left, obj_4 is middle - large distance. obj_6 is right-center, obj_9 is front-center - moderate distance. obj_0-obj_4 > obj_6-obj_9. Answer: >

[qrr_0102] obj_0 to obj_4 vs obj_7 to obj_8: obj_0-obj_4 large distance. obj_7 is left-center, obj_8 is back-right - also large distance. These seem roughly similar. Answer: ~=

[qrr_0103] obj_0 to obj_4 vs obj_7 to obj_9: obj_0-obj_4 large. obj_7-obj_9 moderate. Answer: >

[qrr_0104] obj_0 to obj_4 vs obj_8 to obj_9: obj_0-obj_4 large. obj_8 is back-right, obj_9 is front-center - large distance. These seem comparable. Answer: ~=

[qrr_0105] obj_0 to obj_5 vs obj_1 to obj_2: obj_0 back-left to obj_5 right - very large. obj_1 front to obj_2 middle - moderate. Answer: >

[qrr_0106] obj_0 to obj_5 vs obj_1 to obj_3: obj_0-obj_5 very large. obj_1 front to obj_3 left-top - moderate. Answer: >

[qrr_0107] obj_0 to obj_5 vs obj_1 to obj_4: obj_0-obj_5 very large. obj_1 front to obj_4 middle - moderate. Answer: >

[qrr_0108] obj_0 to obj_5 vs obj_1 to obj_6: obj_0-obj_5 very large. obj_1 front to obj_6 right-center - moderate. Answer: >

[qrr_0109] obj_0 to obj_5 vs obj_1 to obj_7: obj_0-obj_5 very large. obj_1 front to obj_7 left-center - moderate. Answer: >

[qrr_0110] obj_0 to obj_5 vs obj_1 to obj_8: obj_0-obj_5 very large. obj_1 front to obj_8 back-right - large. Answer: >

[qrr_0111] obj_0 to obj_5 vs obj_2 to obj_3: obj_0-obj_5 very large. obj_2 middle to obj_3 left - small. Answer: >

[qrr_0112] obj_0 to obj_5 vs obj_2 to obj_4: obj_0-obj_5 very large. obj_2-obj_4 small. Answer: >

[qrr_0113] obj_0 to obj_5 vs obj_2 to obj_6: obj_0-obj_5 very large. obj_2 middle to obj_6 right-center - moderate. Answer: >

[qrr_0114] obj_0 to obj_5 vs obj_2 to obj_7: obj_0-obj_5 very large. obj_2-obj_7 moderate. Answer: >

[qrr_0115] obj_0 to obj_5 vs obj_2 to obj_8: obj_0-obj_5 very large. obj_2 middle to obj_8 back-right - large. These could be comparable. Answer: ~=

[qrr_0116] obj_0 to obj_5 vs obj_2 to obj_9: obj_0-obj_5 very large. obj_2 middle to obj_9 front - moderate. Answer: >

[qrr_0117] obj_0 to obj_5 vs obj_3 to obj_4: obj_0-obj_5 very large. obj_3-obj_4 moderate. Answer: >

[qrr_0118] obj_0 to obj_5 vs obj_3 to obj_6: obj_0-obj_5 very large. obj_3 left to obj_6 right-center - moderate. Answer: >

[qrr_0119] obj_0 to obj_5 vs obj_3 to obj_7: obj_0-obj_5 very large. obj_3-obj_7 small. Answer: >

[qrr_0120] obj_0 to obj_5 vs obj_3 to obj_8: obj_0-obj_5 very large. obj_3 left to obj_8 back-right - large. These could be comparable. Answer: ~=
